title: cattleya × venosa
intro: Cattleya × venosa, also known as the Veined Cattleya or Cattleya venosa, is a hybrid orchid species within the Cattleya genus, characterized by its distinctive white or pale yellow flowers with green or yellow markings. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cattleya × venosa include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems like diarrhea and nausea. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, often in the form of teas or infusions, and is also used in the production of perfumes and fragrances.
